testcase.classname: resumable finalize return shape without enablePatches finalize with continue true returns finalized state and draft remains usable
testcase.name: resumable finalize return shape without enablePatches finalize with continue true returns finalized state and draft remains usable

testcase.classname: resumable finalize return shape with enablePatches finalize with continue true returns state patches inversePatches tuple
testcase.name: resumable finalize return shape with enablePatches finalize with continue true returns state patches inversePatches tuple

testcase.classname: resumable finalize draft usability after continued finalize property writes on draft work after continued finalize
testcase.name: resumable finalize draft usability after continued finalize property writes on draft work after continued finalize

testcase.classname: resumable finalize draft usability after continued finalize property reads on draft return correct values after continued finalize
testcase.name: resumable finalize draft usability after continued finalize property reads on draft return correct values after continued finalize

testcase.classname: resumable finalize draft usability after continued finalize property deletes on draft work after continued finalize
testcase.name: resumable finalize draft usability after continued finalize property deletes on draft work after continued finalize

testcase.classname: resumable finalize incremental patch generation patches after continued finalize are relative to the new baseline not the original base state
testcase.name: resumable finalize incremental patch generation patches after continued finalize are relative to the new baseline not the original base state

testcase.classname: resumable finalize incremental patch generation terminal finalize after continued finalize only produces patches since last checkpoint
testcase.name: resumable finalize incremental patch generation terminal finalize after continued finalize only produces patches since last checkpoint

testcase.classname: resumable finalize structural sharing unmodified sub-trees share the same reference across consecutive finalizations
testcase.name: resumable finalize structural sharing unmodified sub-trees share the same reference across consecutive finalizations

testcase.classname: resumable finalize works with array drafts array mutations produce correct state across multiple continued finalizations
testcase.name: resumable finalize works with array drafts array mutations produce correct state across multiple continued finalizations

testcase.classname: resumable finalize works with Map drafts Map mutations produce correct state across multiple continued finalizations
testcase.name: resumable finalize works with Map drafts Map mutations produce correct state across multiple continued finalizations

testcase.classname: resumable finalize works with Set drafts Set mutations produce correct state across multiple continued finalizations
testcase.name: resumable finalize works with Set drafts Set mutations produce correct state across multiple continued finalizations

testcase.classname: resumable finalize works with nested drafts deeply nested mutations work correctly after continued finalize
testcase.name: resumable finalize works with nested drafts deeply nested mutations work correctly after continued finalize

testcase.classname: resumable finalize enableAutoFreeze interaction finalized state is frozen but draft remains mutable when enableAutoFreeze is true
testcase.name: resumable finalize enableAutoFreeze interaction finalized state is frozen but draft remains mutable when enableAutoFreeze is true

testcase.classname: resumable finalize enableAutoFreeze interaction terminal state after continued finalize with enableAutoFreeze is correct and frozen
testcase.name: resumable finalize enableAutoFreeze interaction terminal state after continued finalize with enableAutoFreeze is correct and frozen

testcase.classname: resumable finalize multiple sequential continued finalizations three rounds of continued finalization produce correct incremental states and patches
testcase.name: resumable finalize multiple sequential continued finalizations three rounds of continued finalization produce correct incremental states and patches

testcase.classname: resumable finalize apply round-trip correctness apply with inverse patches restores the preceding checkpoint state
testcase.name: resumable finalize apply round-trip correctness apply with inverse patches restores the preceding checkpoint state

testcase.classname: resumable finalize apply round-trip correctness apply with forward patches produces the next checkpoint state
testcase.name: resumable finalize apply round-trip correctness apply with forward patches produces the next checkpoint state

testcase.classname: resumable finalize no-op behavior no changes since creation returns original reference and empty patches
testcase.name: resumable finalize no-op behavior no changes since creation returns original reference and empty patches

testcase.classname: resumable finalize no-op behavior no changes since last checkpoint returns same reference and empty patches
testcase.name: resumable finalize no-op behavior no changes since last checkpoint returns same reference and empty patches

testcase.classname: resumable finalize continue true versus terminal finalize continue true keeps draft alive while terminal finalize revokes it
testcase.name: resumable finalize continue true versus terminal finalize continue true keeps draft alive while terminal finalize revokes it

testcase.classname: resumable finalize continue true versus terminal finalize finalize with continue false behaves identically to finalize with no argument
testcase.name: resumable finalize continue true versus terminal finalize finalize with continue false behaves identically to finalize with no argument

testcase.classname: resumable finalize mixed nested draft types across continuations object containing array, Map, and Set all work correctly across continuations
testcase.name: resumable finalize mixed nested draft types across continuations object containing array, Map, and Set all work correctly across continuations

testcase.classname: resumable finalize enablePatches and enableAutoFreeze combined during continuation patches are correct and states are frozen when both options are enabled
testcase.name: resumable finalize enablePatches and enableAutoFreeze combined during continuation patches are correct and states are frozen when both options are enabled

testcase.classname: resumable finalize isContinuedDraft returns false for a fresh draft that has never been continued
testcase.name: resumable finalize isContinuedDraft returns false for a fresh draft that has never been continued

testcase.classname: resumable finalize isContinuedDraft returns true after a single continued finalization
testcase.name: resumable finalize isContinuedDraft returns true after a single continued finalization

testcase.classname: resumable finalize isContinuedDraft returns true after multiple continued finalizations
testcase.name: resumable finalize isContinuedDraft returns true after multiple continued finalizations

testcase.classname: resumable finalize isContinuedDraft returns false for a non-draft value
testcase.name: resumable finalize isContinuedDraft returns false for a non-draft value

testcase.classname: resumable finalize getContinuationCount returns 0 for a fresh draft
testcase.name: resumable finalize getContinuationCount returns 0 for a fresh draft

testcase.classname: resumable finalize getContinuationCount returns 1 after one continued finalization
testcase.name: resumable finalize getContinuationCount returns 1 after one continued finalization

testcase.classname: resumable finalize getContinuationCount increments with each successive continuation
testcase.name: resumable finalize getContinuationCount increments with each successive continuation

testcase.classname: resumable finalize getContinuationCount returns 0 for non-draft values
testcase.name: resumable finalize getContinuationCount returns 0 for non-draft values

testcase.classname: resumable finalize onContinue lifecycle hook fires after each continued finalization with correct event shape
testcase.name: resumable finalize onContinue lifecycle hook fires after each continued finalization with correct event shape

testcase.classname: resumable finalize onContinue lifecycle hook does not fire on terminal finalization
testcase.name: resumable finalize onContinue lifecycle hook does not fire on terminal finalization

testcase.classname: resumable finalize onContinue lifecycle hook event omits patches and inversePatches when enablePatches is false
testcase.name: resumable finalize onContinue lifecycle hook event omits patches and inversePatches when enablePatches is false

testcase.classname: resumable finalize onContinue lifecycle hook callback error propagates but continuation is committed
testcase.name: resumable finalize onContinue lifecycle hook callback error propagates but continuation is committed

testcase.classname: resumable finalize onContinue lifecycle hook fires with correct continuationCount across multiple rounds
testcase.name: resumable finalize onContinue lifecycle hook fires with correct continuationCount across multiple rounds

testcase.classname: resumable finalize getAccumulatedPatches returns concatenated patches from all continuations
testcase.name: resumable finalize getAccumulatedPatches returns concatenated patches from all continuations

testcase.classname: resumable finalize getAccumulatedPatches applying accumulated patches to original base produces latest continuation state
testcase.name: resumable finalize getAccumulatedPatches applying accumulated patches to original base produces latest continuation state

testcase.classname: resumable finalize getAccumulatedPatches applying accumulated inversePatches in reverse to latest state restores original base
testcase.name: resumable finalize getAccumulatedPatches applying accumulated inversePatches in reverse to latest state restores original base

testcase.classname: resumable finalize getAccumulatedPatches returns null when enablePatches is not enabled
testcase.name: resumable finalize getAccumulatedPatches returns null when enablePatches is not enabled

testcase.classname: resumable finalize getAccumulatedPatches returns null for non-draft values
testcase.name: resumable finalize getAccumulatedPatches returns null for non-draft values

testcase.classname: resumable finalize getAccumulatedPatches returns empty arrays before any continuation has occurred
testcase.name: resumable finalize getAccumulatedPatches returns empty arrays before any continuation has occurred

testcase.classname: resumable finalize getAccumulatedPatches terminal finalize does not add to accumulated patches
testcase.name: resumable finalize getAccumulatedPatches terminal finalize does not add to accumulated patches

testcase.classname: resumable finalize maxContinuations limit allows continuations up to the limit
testcase.name: resumable finalize maxContinuations limit allows continuations up to the limit

testcase.classname: resumable finalize maxContinuations limit throws when continuation count would exceed the limit
testcase.name: resumable finalize maxContinuations limit throws when continuation count would exceed the limit

testcase.classname: resumable finalize maxContinuations limit draft remains usable after the throw
testcase.name: resumable finalize maxContinuations limit draft remains usable after the throw

testcase.classname: resumable finalize maxContinuations limit maxContinuations zero means no continuations allowed
testcase.name: resumable finalize maxContinuations limit maxContinuations zero means no continuations allowed

testcase.classname: resumable finalize maxContinuations limit terminal finalize is never blocked by maxContinuations
testcase.name: resumable finalize maxContinuations limit terminal finalize is never blocked by maxContinuations

testcase.classname: resumable finalize maxContinuations limit works correctly with enablePatches and onContinue together
testcase.name: resumable finalize maxContinuations limit works correctly with enablePatches and onContinue together
